description: The local toolchain needed to build and test Kyberion from source: Node, pnpm, git, and the core TypeScript runner/test CLI helpers.

capabilities.description: Node.js v24+ on PATH (the runtime Kyberion targets; must satisfy package.json engines).

install.instruction: Install Node.js 24+ via your version manager: `nvm install 24 && nvm use 24` or `mise install node@24` (matches `.nvmrc` and package.json engines).
Use Corepack (`corepack enable pnpm`) or `npm i -g pnpm`.
macOS: `brew install git`. Debian/Ubuntu: `apt-get install -y git`.

capabilities.description: TypeScript compiler available through the workspace install.

install.instruction: Install workspace dependencies so `pnpm exec tsc` resolves.

capabilities.description: tsx available for local script execution.

install.instruction: Install workspace dependencies so `pnpm exec tsx` resolves.

capabilities.description: vitest available for local test execution.

install.instruction: Install workspace dependencies so `pnpm exec vitest` resolves.

capabilities.description: Playwright browser cache present (chromium). Browser first-win (screenshot smoke, browser:goto) silently falls back to text without it.

install.instruction: Run `pnpm exec playwright install chromium` (network download, ~150MB). Not run automatically by postinstall.
